title: Create: Vintage
description: Much vintage, some improvements, Unofficial Port of Vintage: Improvements with Create v6 compatibility.
body:
This is a Unofficial Port of Vintage Improvements for Create v6 with KubeJS integration

You can make recipes and springs via KubeJS. For Syntax pls look at the gallery or at the Wiki.

If you want to use KubeJS for creating some recipes, be sure you have the AddOn KubeJS Create too.

For any errors, bugs or something else, visit our Discord server.

Special Credits goes to: [Negodya1](https://modrinth.com/user/Negodya1) the Mod Author of [Create: Vintage Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-vintage-improvements)
